list.name: ri
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS ri FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.site_type::text FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT s.description FROM monitoring.sites s JOIN monitoring.fact_site_event f ON f.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown')) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') AND ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.site_id) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') AND ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') AND ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0)::numeric,2) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') AND ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0, 2) AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') AND ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}');

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0 AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') AND ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(f.event_start_timestamp, $__interval), SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0 AS value FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') AND ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT s.site_type::text AS site_type, COUNT(*) AS jobs FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') AND ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY jobs DESC;

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') AS ri, COUNT(DISTINCT s.site_id) AS sites, COUNT(DISTINCT s.site_type::text) AS site_types, ROUND((SUM(COALESCE(f.energy_wh,0))/1000.0)::numeric,2) AS energy_kwh, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(f.cfp_g,0))/1000.0,2) AS cfp_kg, COUNT(*) AS jobs FROM monitoring.fact_site_event f JOIN monitoring.sites s ON s.site_id = f.site_id WHERE $__timeFilter(f.event_start_timestamp) AND ('${ri:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(f.owner),''),'Unknown') = '${ri:text}') AND ('${site_type:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.site_type::text = '${site_type:text}') AND ('${site:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR s.description = '${site:text}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY energy_kwh DESC;
